# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template that creates a service account and generates a JSON key file for application authentication. Include the key creation in the template so applications can authenticate immediately. This is for our application services that need GCP API access from outside GCP.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - name: service-account
    type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:services.projects.serviceAccounts
    properties:
      accountId: my-service-account
      displayName: "My Service Account"
    metadata:
      dependsOn: ["project"]

  - name: json-key-file
    type: gcp-types/iam:v1:projects.serviceAccounts.keys.create
    properties:
      name: "${service-account.name}/keys"
      keyAlgorithm: KEY_ALGORITHM_UNSPECIFIED
      privateKeyType: PRIVATE_KEY_TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE
    metadata:
      dependsOn: ["service-account"]
      managedDependencies: true
